A chaotic, unfiltered comedy podcast where two dangerously witty women with short attention spans and dark minds spiral through taboo topics, intrusive thoughts, and “we probably shouldn’t say this” moments.

Listen now Support us
Who we are
Meet your hosts
Kimmi Kaiy
Tap to find out more
Jen Jenivive
Tap to find out more
Kimmi Kaiy

Kimmi Kaiy is a Comedian and content creator who’s had millions of views online. She’s known for her “little bit funny” skits and her dark sense of humour. At the grand old age of 38 she still doesn’t understand algebra but does understand the need to wear SPF!

Follow Kimmi

Jen Jenivive

Jen Jenivive is the cheeky mind behind a range of adult humour books packed with sharp wit, playful innuendo, and laugh-out-loud moments. Her stories are short, bold, and just the right amount of inappropriate—perfect for readers who like their comedy clever, quick, and a little bit naughty.

Follow Jen
